summary: Ticket Configuration Feature Testing - ALL TESTS PASSED. Dynamic business data configuration for 80mm thermal ticket implemented and working correctly. All 7 features verified: Settings > Sistema ticket config section present, all form fields editable, data persists to backend, TicketDemo loads server config, 'Servidor' indicator shows green, GET/PUT /api/system/config endpoints work correctly.
passed_tests: TEST 1: Settings > Sistema tab displays 'Datos del Negocio para Ticket' section - PASS
TEST 2: ticket-business-name field present and editable - PASS
TEST 3: ticket-legal-name field present and editable - PASS
TEST 4: ticket-rnc field present and editable - PASS
TEST 5: ticket-address and ticket-address2 fields present and editable - PASS
TEST 6: ticket-phone field present and editable - PASS
TEST 7: ticket-email field present and editable - PASS
TEST 8: ticket-ncf-expiry field present and editable - PASS
TEST 9: ticket-footer-message field present and editable - PASS
TEST 10: ticket-dgii-message field present and editable - PASS
TEST 11: save-ticket-config button (green) present and clickable - PASS
TEST 12: GET /api/system/config returns 200 - PASS
TEST 13: PUT /api/system/config saves ticket_* fields correctly - PASS
TEST 14: PUT then GET verifies data persistence in MongoDB - PASS
TEST 15: Partial update preserves other system config fields - PASS
TEST 16: TicketDemo page loads correctly at /ticket-demo - PASS
TEST 17: TicketDemo shows 'Servidor' indicator (green) when using server config - PASS
TEST 18: TicketDemo displays ticket_business_name from server - PASS
TEST 19: TicketDemo displays ticket_rnc from server - PASS
TEST 20: TicketDemo displays ticket_address, ticket_phone from server - PASS
TEST 21: TicketDemo displays ticket_footer_message from server - PASS
TEST 22: TicketDemo displays ticket_dgii_message from server - PASS
critical_code_review_comments: Ticket config implementation is clean and follows existing patterns
useBusinessConfig hook properly fetches from /api/system/config endpoint
Settings.js correctly uses data-testid attributes for all fields
Backend PUT /api/system/config uses MongoDB $set with upsert=True for reliability
Frontend correctly falls back to default values if server config is not available
seed_data_creation: Test data with prefix 'TESTING RESTAURANT ABC' created during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Ticket configuration feature fully functional. Settings > Sistema > Datos del Negocio para Ticket section contains all fields (nombre comercial, razón social, RNC, dirección, teléfono, email, fecha NCF, mensajes). Config saved via PUT /api/system/config. TicketDemo at /ticket-demo shows 'Servidor' indicator when server config loaded. ThermalTicket.js useBusinessConfig hook handles loading.

features_verified.settings_section_visible: PASS - 'Datos del Negocio para Ticket' section in Settings > Sistema
features_verified.all_form_fields_present: PASS - 10 editable fields with data-testid attributes
features_verified.save_button_works: PASS - Green 'GUARDAR DATOS DEL TICKET' button persists data
features_verified.backend_put_config: PASS - PUT /api/system/config saves ticket_* fields to MongoDB
features_verified.ticketdemo_loads_config: PASS - /ticket-demo loads config from server via useBusinessConfig
features_verified.servidor_indicator: PASS - Green 'Servidor' badge visible when using server config
